name: Potatoes Au Canine or Feline
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the first 5 ingredients in a casserole dish.
2. Pour the milk evenly over all.
3. Sprinkle with cheese.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes, or until the cheese melts and lightly browns.
5. Serve cool.
Notes: As a potato substitute, you can use 3 cups of cooked oatmeal or 3 cups cooked brown rice.
